user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship (Souvenir Shopping)
fields.description: Flagship department store with a wide selection of Canadian souvenirs, apparel, and gifts — ideal for last-minute presents and keepsakes before departure.

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested a souvenir stop in the morning before the CN Tower. Inserting at position 1 places this between the hotel breakfast (ends 8:15 AM) and the CN Tower (10:00 AM), allowing time to shop and travel to the tower.
